description: Reviews written content against strategy before publishing. Checks voice, messaging alignment, CTA, channel fit, length. NOT for reviewing strategy itself.

cases.query: I just finished drafting a LinkedIn post about our new feature. Can you review it before I publish? I want to make sure the voice is right.
Check this post. I wrote an X thread for our launch and I need someone to tell me if the CTA is strong enough and whether the hook will land.
Is this ready to publish? I wrote a blog post last night and I want to make sure it matches our strategy and brand voice before it goes live.
Content review please. I have three posts in the content/ folder and I need all of them checked against our messaging pillars.
Review before posting. I'm about to ship this email newsletter and I want a final check on tone, CTA, and whether it fits the format.
Does this match my brand? I wrote a launch announcement thread but I'm worried it sounds too corporate and doesn't match the voice in my strategy.
Check my thread. I drafted a 7-tweet thread about why we built this product. Is it too long? Does the narrative arc work?
I need a content check on this HN launch post. Make sure it doesn't sound like marketing fluff and actually resonates with the HN audience.
Review my email draft. I'm sending this to our waitlist tomorrow and I want to confirm the messaging aligns with our positioning.
I just ran /forbotsake-create and it generated a LinkedIn post. Before I publish, can you review it and score it?
Is this content piece ready for my audience? I want to catch any messaging drift or weak spots before I hit publish.
I wrote a product update post for X. Can you tell me if the length is right for the platform and if the CTA makes sense?
Review my marketing strategy. I want to know if my positioning holds up and whether my channel choices make sense for my ICP.
Is my strategy good? I just finished writing strategy.md and I want someone to rate each section before I start executing.
Challenge my marketing plan. I'm worried my positioning is too generic and won't differentiate us from competitors.
Poke holes in my strategy. I need a skeptical CMO perspective on whether my ICP is concrete enough.
Write me a LinkedIn post about our Series A announcement. I want it to be authentic and not sound like every other fundraising post.
Post this to X. It's been reviewed and I'm happy with it. Just need it published.
What should I post this week? I need a content calendar for the next 4 weeks with specific topics and themes.
How should I market this product? I have no strategy yet. Help me figure out positioning, ICP, and channels.
Do marketing for me. Just run the whole pipeline from scratch.
What worked in our marketing last month? Run a retro on our content performance.
Schedule my reviewed posts to auto-publish at 9am every day. Set up the cron job.
